title: Invisible Entities
description: Turns most entities invisible! Why would you want to play like this???
body:
## What does this resource pack do?
It literally does what it says in the title. It turns all* entities invisible.

## Why would I want to play like this?
It would be a fun challenge to, for example, beat the game without being able to see any entities...

## Okay, I want to try this out but its way too difficult to play! I don't know where anything is!
Well... Thats kind of the point... but there is also a "easy mode":
<details>
<summary>Easy mode</summary>
Press F3+B to enable show hitboxes. This will make it so you can at least see where the thing attacking you is... but you still don't know what it is >:)
</details>

## Three last notes:
- This resource pack doesn't affect tile entities like beds or chests with the exception of shulker boxes.
- While this resource pack should _in theory_ work for all versions 1.6.1 and above, I just don't have the time to test them all.
- And, of course, you can use this in your modpacks or anything else. _If you wanted to for some reason._
